result.status_detail: DeepSeek login screen rendered (phone/email + password). Sign-in required before chat — cannot submit prompt.

notes: v2.2.3 baseline. Same condition as #791 — chat.deepseek.com redirects to login (전화번호/이메일 + 비밀번호 fields detected via Snapshot DOM). No way to submit RRN prompt or evaluate 차단 text. Recommend: (a) provision deepseek test account + persistent profile cookies, or (b) deprioritize deepseek from no-auth rotation set. Capability check (test-pc inbound): no credential available, scenario blocked at navigation step.
